content_body: The Royal Mountain Lodge is unbelievable! It is a beautiful lodge with five private plush master bedrooms with ensuite bathrooms. Each has a unique style and amazing view of the Blue Ridge Mountains and Lake Blue Ridge. I did not have to worry about people fighting over bedrooms because every room was sheer perfection! Thank you so much for offering this property.  It was an absolute dream!  I hosted an executive retreat here and everyone was amazed at the property. The property is located just a few miles off the beaten path but you feel a million miles away. The three porches wrapping around each of level of the house offer seating areas, swings, and a hot tub, all with privacy and amazing views. The cabin rental company was very responsive and provided assistance with reservations, location, and suggested restaurants. The cleaning service had the lodge absolutely spotless with special touches in every bedroom. You will not find a more luxurious and welcoming property in Blue Ridge! I plan to come back to this location with family soon!
title: It Was a Dream!
